R1.label: R1
R1.config:
alias exec slaac show ipv6 interface GigabitEthernet0/5 | include Global
alias exec uptime show version | include uptime
alias exec slaac_600170021f87ec0c show ipv6 interface GigabitEthernet0/5 | include 2600:1700:21f8:7ec0::c
interface GigabitEthernet0/5
 description OOB Mgmt | TG-190 | 2600:1700:21f8:7ec0::c
